questions.question: Which of the following expresses the time when something happens?
questions.explanation: 「at five o'clock」は具体的な時刻を表すときに使います。at は特定の時点を指します。

questions.question: How do we say 'I don't work on Saturday evenings' in English?
choices: I don't work on Saturday evenings.
I don't work at Saturday evenings.
I don't work in Saturday evenings.
I don't work on Saturdays evenings.
questions.correct_answer: I don't work on Saturday evenings.
questions.explanation: 曜日や曜日の一部（Saturday evenings）には前置詞「on」を使います。

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT an example of a time expression used in the image?
questions.explanation: 「in the 18th century」は画像中の時間表現の例として挙げられていません。

questions.question: Which of the following expressions is used to talk about the present moment?
questions.explanation: 「at present」は「現在、今」という意味で、現在の瞬間を表すときに使います。
